82ed2af0f0.en: How the Nomik Bridge browser extension handles your data — what it accesses, what it never touches, and how you stay in control.

5230e574e0.en: How the Nomik Bridge browser extension handles your data — what it accesses, what it never touches, and how you stay in control. Last updated: 16 June 2026.

362c84e9d9.en: Nomik Bridge connects your Nomik account to a single browser tab you explicitly allow, so a Nomik agent can act in your own logged-in session. The agent's intelligence and the security gate run on Nomik's servers; the extension is a thin, auditable relay on your device. Questions: privacy@nomik.ai.

ae589e9a8c.en: Account sign-in: when you sign in, the extension obtains and stores — locally on your device — an access token and refresh token for your Nomik account. It never receives or stores your password.

f2af92a2cd.en: The allowlisted tab, during an attended session: after you accept a pairing, the extension relays Chrome DevTools commands from Nomik's servers to the one tab you allowed, and streams that tab's content and results back to your Nomik agent — only while the session is active, and only for that tab.

9f5bec5515.en: We do not read or transmit your cookies — they remain on your device.

dd06e2df60.en: We do not run remote code; everything the extension executes ships inside it.

9c1ef8c5a2.en: We do not access tabs you have not paired, and we auto-detach the moment the paired tab navigates away.

e70f24eba4.en: We do not sell your data, use it for advertising, or use it for any purpose unrelated to the function above.

465dae9045.en: A deny-list enforced on your device blocks arbitrary script execution and browser-control commands, regardless of any server instruction.

fe7d03f3aa.en: Authentication information: your Nomik sign-in tokens, used only to keep you signed in and to authorize the relay.

baf774f8e0.en: Website content: the content of the single allowlisted tab, during an active session, relayed to your own Nomik agent.

0a0e8cccaa.en: No other categories are collected — no personal communications, location, financial data, web history, or activity monitoring. We do not sell or transfer your data to third parties, do not use it for unrelated purposes, and do not use it for creditworthiness or lending.

cecec0efde.en: A persistent browser bar shows whenever a session is live. You can stop it at any time from the extension popup or by closing that bar, and you can sign out from the popup to revoke the extension's access entirely.

ff9fa30a0c.en: Questions about this policy: privacy@nomik.ai. We'll respond within one month.

e43c5f0266.en: If we change this notice we'll update the date at the top. For material changes we'll notify Nomik account holders.

20c9a46b8f.en: The short version: this marketing site sets no tracking cookies. Analytics is cookie-free and aggregate. Last updated: 23 May 2026.

43e53efa45.en: What we set on this marketing site

00503c7e9b.en: We use a privacy-friendly analytics tool (Plausible) configured in cookie-free mode. It records aggregate page views, country, and referrer, with no individual identifiers and no cross-site tracking. No advertising or session cookies are set by Nomik on this site.

b0973a8e9c.en: What we set on the platform (when you log in)

38528b5c73.en: Once you create an account and log into the Nomik platform, we use the minimum set of cookies and local storage needed to keep you signed in and to make the product work:

ce388b7f42.en: Authentication: a session token (cookie or local storage) so you stay signed in across page loads. Necessary; you cannot opt out without losing access.

508cc14e69.en: Preferences: small items in local storage for UI state (open panels, last workspace), no tracking.

53824b0a52.en: We do not use third-party advertising, profiling, or cross-site tracking cookies on the platform.

e7c7ba2b04.en: Fonts are loaded from Google Fonts (cached by your browser; no cookies). If you embed a third-party integration into your workspace (for example, an in-product preview), that integration's own cookies may apply, governed by the provider's policy.

a822e0c11a.en: You can clear cookies and local storage at any time from your browser settings (clearing the auth cookie will sign you out).

b0fbdf602c.en: Most browsers offer a global Do Not Track signal; we honour it where applicable.

b70d738155.en: Analytics on this marketing site sets no cookies, so there is no per-visitor opt-out to set; if you want zero traffic recorded, use a content blocker.

bb550787cf.en: If we change cookies or analytics, this page is updated and the date at the top changes. For material changes affecting accounts, we notify by email.

38058503d3.en: Summary of the Nomik Data Processing Agreement (DPA): roles, scope, sub-processors, security, transfers, and how to request a signed copy.

602c2c6cfb.en: This page is a public summary, marked DRAFT. For a signed DPA suitable for procurement, email legal@nomik.ai. Last updated: 23 May 2026.

d2d1a7a567.en: For workspace content you put into Nomik, you (the customer) are the data controller and Nomik is the data processor. We process personal data on your documented instructions, which are reflected in the service configuration (workspaces, members, integrations, deployment tier).

549a71ea21.en: Nomik processes personal data only to provide the platform: hosting workspaces, running agents, executing approved actions, logging the glass-box audit trail, sending notifications, and billing.

f36e1096dc.en: Categories of data subjects and data

1a9e15707a.en: Subjects: your employees, contractors, customers, prospects, and other people whose data flows through your workspaces.

9f88f49735.en: Data: identifiers, contact details, content you and your agents create, communications, files you upload, and the operational metadata required to run the service.

b6dc7a8e87.en: Special categories: Nomik is not designed for special-category data; if your use requires it, talk to us so we can scope the deployment (private cloud or on-prem).

bf3d12722e.en: We use a limited set of sub-processors (hosting, payments, email, support, observability). Each is bound by a back-to-back DPA. The current list is available on request and notice of changes is given to customers in advance, with a right to object.

80bbf3061a.en: Tenant isolation: per-workspace boundaries, scoped credentials, vault for secrets.

32057f53be.en: Access control: least privilege, audit logs, MFA for staff.

6383dbcf58.en: Glass-box audit: every consequential action by a human or agent is recorded.

10c4f3cf93.en: Backups: encrypted, time-bound retention, regular restore tests.

d0c7e3588a.en: Incident response: defined playbook with notification to affected customers without undue delay (and within 72 hours where required).

31ed335b3e.en: Where data leaves the EEA we rely on Standard Contractual Clauses and equivalent safeguards. Enterprise customers can pin region to the EU or deploy on-prem so data never leaves their boundary.

9101ce772b.en: We assist controllers in responding to data-subject requests (access, rectification, erasure, portability, restriction, objection) through documented endpoints and, where needed, manual operator support.

a454820e62.en: We retain personal data for as long as the workspace exists. On termination of the contract or on a documented deletion request, we delete the relevant data within 30 days, subject to legal retention obligations. Backups roll off within 30 days.

839e6d2914.en: Enterprise customers can request audit information (security questionnaires, certifications, sub-processor list). On-site audits are scoped on a case-by-case basis with reasonable notice.

9ea7b44f70.en: Liability under the DPA follows the limits in the main agreement (see terms), subject to the carve-outs required by GDPR.

69ceb3f602.en: Email legal@nomik.ai with your company name and intended use. We'll send the current DPA template, including the SCCs and the sub-processor list.

f7d807824a.en: How Nomik collects, uses, and protects personal data. Lawful bases, retention, your data-subject rights, and how to reach us.

588764dcfd.en: How Nomik handles personal data, the lawful bases we rely on, how long we keep it, and how to exercise your rights. Last updated: 17 June 2026.

8415d87ee4.en: Nomik ("we", "us") is the data controller for personal data processed on this marketing site and for accounts created on the Nomik platform. For questions or to exercise your rights, write to privacy@nomik.ai.

901d2b23a2.en: Marketing site: the email you submit to the waitlist or contact form, and aggregate, cookie-free analytics (page views, country, referrer) from a privacy-friendly analytics tool.

7f47af0f27.en: Platform accounts: account identifiers (email, name), workspace and team metadata, audit and billing records.

1e71d12517.en: Operational data: content you and your agents create inside workspaces (chat, files, decisions, traces). This is processed on your behalf, you control it.

e140bfef3e.en: Diagnostics: error reports and request logs, kept short-term to operate the service.

1fc4824b6b.en: Contract (Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR): to deliver the service you sign up for, run your workspaces, and bill you.

65adeb62a2.en: Legitimate interests (Art. 6(1)(f)): to keep the service secure, prevent abuse, and improve features. We balance these against your rights and offer opt-outs where relevant.

819fa606d6.en: Consent (Art. 6(1)(a)): for the waitlist email and any optional marketing communication. You can withdraw consent at any time.

f65385f0b3.en: Legal obligation (Art. 6(1)(c)): tax, accounting, and other compliance records.

07e2133af4.en: Waitlist email: until launch or until you ask us to delete it, whichever comes first.

b2ff1fb3b0.en: Account data: while your account is active, plus a short grace window after closure for backups and legal records (typically 30 to 90 days), then deletion.

99fdc93b07.en: Workspace content: retained for the lifetime of the workspace; you can delete content or the whole workspace at any time. Backups roll off within 30 days.

6a864aa390.en: Billing records: kept for the period required by tax law (typically 7 to 10 years depending on jurisdiction).

3bc9e0623b.en: Under the GDPR you have the right to:

7e1572e230.en: Access: a copy of the personal data we hold about you.

c513fb49f2.en: Rectification: correct anything that's wrong or out of date.

881bd84d5a.en: Erasure: ask us to delete your personal data, subject to legal retention obligations.

cf5db21a22.en: Portability: receive your data in a structured, machine-readable format.

7f67fd8aba.en: Restriction and objection: pause or object to specific processing.

ea9cf9cfd0.en: Withdraw consent: at any time, without affecting prior processing.

3bea872053.en: Complain: to your local data protection authority.

93ac88fb20.en: To exercise any of these, email privacy@nomik.ai. We'll respond within one month.

5f4923b283.en: We use a small set of processors to run the service (hosting, payments, email, support). Each one is bound by a data processing agreement and processes data only on our instructions. On request we can share the current sub-processor list. For Enterprise customers we sign a Data Processing Agreement (see DPA).

dd401f9a1c.en: Nomik lets you connect third-party apps — such as Google Workspace, Airtable, Slack, Notion and GitHub — so your agents can act in them on your behalf. Every connection follows the same principles:

20847ac934.en: Least privilege: we request only the permissions (scopes) a connector needs for the features you use, and you see and approve them on the provider's own consent screen before anything is granted.

f9364cd19d.en: Encrypted credentials: OAuth tokens and API keys are stored encrypted (AES-256-GCM) in a per-workspace vault, bound to your workspace, and are never written to logs.

9df19de6f8.en: Acts on your instruction: agents read or change data in a connected app only to carry out a task you — or your workspace's rules — asked for, gated by your autonomy and approval settings.

e37350dc1a.en: You stay in control: you can disconnect any app at any time from within Nomik, or revoke access from the provider directly. Disconnecting deletes the stored credential.

2105f851d1.en: No ads, no model training: we never sell provider data, use it for advertising, or use it to train generalized AI models.

a6d68553f4.en: When you connect a Google account or Google Workspace, Nomik accesses Gmail, Google Calendar and Google Drive through Google's APIs — using only the scopes you approve — solely to provide the features you ask your agents to perform. Exactly what we request, and why:

682249fefd.en: Read, organize and label messages in your mailbox

cdbdf091a6.en: Triage your inbox, label and file mail, and prepare replies

92751f85b3.en: Send the replies and messages you approve

d44875cbae.en: Read and write files in your Google Drive

54054b5561.en: Schedule and update meetings, and check availability

d2279a8136.en: What we access: only the Google data covered by the scopes above. We do not request access we don't use.

b87e0e2493.en: How we store it: Google access and refresh tokens are kept encrypted in the vault. We don't retain copies of your Gmail or Drive content beyond what's needed to perform a requested task and show the result in your workspace; you control that content and can delete it.

4c7d4514d9.en: No human access: no one at Nomik reads your Google user data, except where you give consent, where required for security or to comply with the law, or on aggregated/anonymized data for operations.

d2602d2967.en: Revoke anytime: disconnect in Nomik, or remove access at myaccount.google.com/permissions.

5563cae399.en: Nomik's use and transfer to any other app of information received from Google APIs will adhere to the Google API Services User Data Policy, including the Limited Use requirements.

b9b0421ef8.en: Where data leaves the EEA, we rely on Standard Contractual Clauses and equivalent safeguards. On Enterprise plans you can pin region to EU-only or run on-prem so data never leaves your boundary.

1f19d9d3e9.en: This marketing site uses no tracking cookies. Analytics is cookie-free and aggregate. See the cookies notice for details.

c104d52410.en: If we change this notice we'll update the date at the top and, for material changes, notify account holders by email.

dfa189bfd7.en: The model layer of Nomik, the operating system for AI labor: the Nomik-1 program, a governed open-weight agent model trained on graded trajectories from our own verification harness. Apache-2.0 release target. Ongoing.

063737a01a.en: Nomik is the operating system for AI labor. Nomik-1 is the model layer underneath it: our open-weight agent model program, post-train an open base model until it natively speaks our tool calls, carries our personas and safety gates in its own weights, and serves the fleet's volume tier on hardware you can point at. The program is under way. This is the internal memo that started it, published as written.

bb7fbc5f1d.en: cheaper per million tokens than small-tier APIs at fleet utilization, before prompt-shrink compounding

448021e90f.en: new infrastructure: our QA harness is already the data factory and the eval suite

415420d18f.en: verified scenario environments, running today as the fleet's regression suite

40a97a2f69.en: parameters: small enough to serve from one GPU, or a Mac Studio

5aa7c4c3e7.en: The endpoint of the trajectory: a 14B-parameter agent model, post-trained from an open base, that natively speaks our tool-call format, carries our personas and safety gates in its weights, and serves the fleet's high-volume tier, self-hosted or on a customer's hardware. It is the model layer the AI workforce runs on at volume.

16ec2aece4.en: This is the recipe the strongest open-model labs already proved. None of them pretrained a flagship. They took someone else's open base and made it theirs through data curation and post-training, at roughly 1/1000th the cost of pretraining. The lineage:

1504441afd.en: 52 verified scenarios + outcome graders, already running

5572cd5602.en: The base is someone else's hundred-million-dollar pretrain. The product is the data, and our harness already manufactures it.

3bbbb00543.en: Five reasons, three of them already measured.

37f8da9183.en: Three of these we measured in our own harness. Two are structural. The economic case gets its own section below.

1c9fbcdf8d.en: Some agent behaviors are prompt-unreachable: no persona edit moves them, because they live in the model's priors. Fine-tuning is precisely the lever that moves priors.

2d9cbba36e.en: Measured: delegation reach plateaued near 50% across every persona edit we shipped.

4642664e21.en: Fleet cost policy already reserves frontier models for frontier work. A self-hosted 14B serves the high-volume tier below any API's per-token price, and idles at zero on per-token hosting.

046b4ca9a5.en: One rented GPU serves a quantized 14B at thousands of tokens per second.

c2e9762c25.en: A sovereign deployment can't ship an API key. An open-weight model that runs on one GPU or a Mac Studio is the on-prem fleet engine, and an open release is the credibility layer.

620cbd28fe.en: See deployment & sovereignty: on-prem is a feature, not a footnote.

94790a3b22.en: A single-vendor fleet is a single point of failure

9bcb4ccbed.en: We lived it: one provider balance error halted every probe in flight. Owning a fleet-grade model converts a hard outage into a failover.

9279ebd106.en: The hard part is already built

6594d369ca.en: Verified environments, graded sampling against a teacher, outcome graders, a locked regression suite: most teams must build that pipeline before they can start. Ours runs every day, because doing QA right built it for us.

f09eb1ea5e.en: 52 verified scenarios · outcome graders · sampling harness · evidence bundles, all live.

4e1ddeba02.en: Efficient to run. Bankable to own.

ab58859d7d.en: Two halves of one case. Efficient is the operating story: the same fleet work at a fraction of the unit cost, compounding over time. Bankable is the balance-sheet story: the weights and the dataset that trained them become assets we own, price, and ship.

d28c78d3f0.en: one GPU, batched · $0 idle on per-token hosts

08a1a93837.en: Specialist beats generalist on bounded work

47ebd142e9.en: The fleet's task distribution is narrow and known; 52 scenarios describe it. A 14B specialist serves it from one GPU. Cost per token falls as utilization rises. API prices never do.

2569dec6bb.en: Behavior in weights stops being re-billed

34d575bae7.en: Today every behavior lives in prompt bytes: persona, gates, skills, resent on every turn, fleet-wide. Baked into weights, those tokens disappear from the bill, and the saving compounds because agent turns dominate traffic.

c5c6d51e25.en: Measured: our destructive-op gate costs 4 persona lines today. In weights it costs 0.

00dec095d9.en: No throttles, no outages, no repricing

2183fa3abd.en: Own serving means no per-IP rate limits storming the harness, no provider balance errors halting the fleet, and no upstream price change rewriting unit costs overnight.

f26831a1a0.en: Efficient is the operating win. Bankable is the asset.

75ffd9cd67.en: Weights plus the dataset nobody else can collect.

0a84c25e59.en: API spend scales 1:1 with every agent seat sold; margin is capped by someone else's price list. Owned weights flip that: serving cost is near-fixed, so gross margin expands with growth.

79d01c1af7.en: A SKU that can't exist on API keys

c4ad614155.en: On-prem and sovereign deployments: regulated customers pay a premium for a fleet that ships as weights inside their own walls. No API vendor can be in that room. There, the model is the SKU.

e58613a7f6.en: Graded enterprise-agent trajectories with verified safety outcomes are a rare data class. Dataset plus weights are durable, licensable IP: the opposite of a wrapper.

3877eddcc6.en: The market already prices this playbook

c50cbf5fac.en: Labs that post-train open bases and release the weights have raised at unicorn valuations on exactly this recipe. Open weights double as go-to-market: distribution, credibility, hiring.

b2f73e9a5b.en: And the positioning is unclaimed: the governed agent model. The only open agent model shipping with a measured destructive-action gate and approval discipline in its weights. Glass box by default. That is Nomik's brand, exported as a model card.

e6269a9d49.en: Six stages. Four were already running before the program existed, because they are how we QA the fleet. Only the dataset exporter and the training run are new, and every step is gated and cheap to abandon.

f76b19beb5.en: 52 verified environments with fixtures and mocks

92fec7d596.en: the teacher fleet runs N probes per scenario

83154a244f.en: outcome graders return pass / fail verdicts

98421e4336.en: pass → fine-tune data · pass⊕fail → preference pairs

55e6dc3445.en: post-train an open 14B base on rented GPUs

a41e485317.en: the locked suite, scored against today's baseline

5488e8ab73.en: ↺ weights deploy to the fleet → every future trace comes from a better model → round-2 data improves. The flywheel.

6ab8744a34.en: Trace exporter from the harness · 50–100K graded trajectories · LoRA fine-tune of an open 14B · eval

ec71431b5e.en: Locked pass-rate within 5 points of the teacher baseline

c12acd9014.en: Preference tuning on pass/fail pairs · graders as verifiable reward on the weakest scenario families

e707466533.en: +10 points on at least 2 prompt-unreachable behaviors

3c348ed2f5.en: Full-parameter 14B · personas and gates baked into weights · shrink the prompt budget

f3464aecf5.en: Parity at half the serving cost or better

01ca9bb61e.en: Weights + the scenario-derived dataset + a tech report on Hugging Face, Apache-2.0 · fleet default for the volume tier · the on-prem bundle

7ac05b035b.en: No pretraining: post-training is the entire strategy. The open ecosystem's pretrains are our baseline, not our bill.

2046c98ce6.en: No hardware purchases: rented GPUs only, and serving falls back to per-token hosting at zero idle cost.

fa1f0dbfc7.en: No 70B+ until 14B is exhausted: scale is the last lever, not the first.

589bdad68f.en: Frontier APIs stay: Nomik-1 targets the volume tier. Frontier models keep the frontier work, by choice.

2d53659368.en: Why the harness is the unfair advantage

6349ebcceb.en: What the strongest open-model labs spent years building, verified environments, synthetic data generation, rejection sampling, is structurally identical to what our agent training program runs every day: scenarios with fixtures, sampling against a teacher, graders that verify outcomes, and a locked regression suite.

5daa9f2e9a.en: Most teams attempting a fine-tune must build the eval and data pipeline first. Ours is operational and adversarially debugged.

8a774e2f61.en: An honest split: what the harness has already measured, which is why we believe the thesis, versus what the end-state buys once the flywheel has run.

6dd6c70740.en: A destructive-op gate moved from 56% to 100% compliance with a 4-line persona edit: proof behavior moves with the right lever, and that prompt budget is the current currency.

ff8ab8313c.en: Delegation reach sits near 50%, unchanged across measured persona edits: classified prompt-unreachable, a model-prior ceiling.

c591e6d259.en: 52 locked scenarios form a regression-grade eval suite, operational and adversarially debugged.

ed861be8ec.en: Vendor SPOF confirmed in production: one provider error halted all fleet probing.

7ec2b4ea53.en: The volume tier self-served at half of API cost or less, margin expanding with utilization.

fe61ce7707.en: Behaviors live in weights: delegation reach 70%+, the destructive gate 95%+ with no prompt bullet at all.

120e36fc48.en: On-prem becomes real: the fleet ships as weights on one GPU or a Mac Studio.

2cd3bd1b0c.en: Weights and dataset public on Hugging Face under Apache-2.0: brand, distribution, and a licensable asset.

ad3b5d56b1.en: P0 kill: eval lands more than 10 points below baseline after one data-mix iteration → stop. Total sunk: days of rented compute and a reusable trace exporter.

efeef11557.en: Govern and supervise your AI workforce: human approvals, an autonomy dial with a money-and-destructive floor, spend caps that pause the fleet, a fail-closed kill switch, per-tenant isolation, RS256 auth, and a glass-box audit with a decisions ledger, plus open-core self-hosting on your own models.

cfb20dd264.en: Control doesn't come from crippling your AI employees. It comes from making everything visible and putting a human gate on the steps that touch money, data, or the outside world. The boundary, the spend, and the off switch stay in your hands. This is the accountability layer for your AI workforce.

8a0e95844f.en: Inside their own sandbox, your AI employees act freely, that's what makes them useful. The things that touch the outside world or cost real money are proposed by an AI employee and approved by a human. The tool call itself is the proposal, so nothing fires until you say yes.

48140247c4.en: The management and accountability layer for your AI workforce: six controls, each enforced in the backend, not just drawn in the UI.

c8d604d4c7.en: Consequential actions are held at the gate: an AI employee proposes, a human approves, and the platform re-runs the approved action server-side, so the AI employee never re-touches it. Cards appear inline with full context and Approve / Deny.

6c3b95b986.en: Per workspace, per action-class, three stops: suggest-only → one-click approve → auto + notify. Let routine drafting run on its own while money stays on suggest-only. Money and destructive actions stay gated even at full autonomy, a floor the dial can't cross.

7222053c53.en: Set a daily, monthly, or lifetime cap on a workspace. Cross it and the workforce pauses, then auto-resumes when the next budget window opens. Any model is allowed, including Opus, Sonnet is the sensible default, so it's spend, not a model gate, that's bounded.

d2fb919eab.en: Pause any turn, any AI employee, or the whole workspace, live from chat. A paused workspace fails closed, returning 423 to every AI employee action, paused means paused. Sliding per-thread turn budgets stop runaway agent-to-agent loops.

b76ad2f6dd.en: Every thought, tool call, and dollar is a durable, traced event you can replay. A decisions ledger records every approval, who raised it, who resolved it, on whose credentials, and what it did.

a0ab07aa05.en: Owner / Admin / Member for people. AI employees are workspace-pinned principals that can never perform a human-only act, approving a gate, changing billing, or relaxing the dial, and an AI employee can never approve its own request.

655197ea44.en: Every connector action is classified into one of seven risk categories before it can run. Read-only verbs pass straight through; the categories below hold.

b0bb99ec13.en: Any spend or payment, refunds, plan / billing changes

1308921edb.en: Deleting data, dropping resources, removing members, deleting a workspace

1833acfc8d.en: Customer email, ticket replies, social posts, and chat messages

fc7ce48c90.en: Deploys to production, publishing, activating a workflow

efdaf8299b.en: Granting credentials, connecting / disconnecting integrations, relaxing the autonomy dial

e6476695e3.en: Hiring and retiring AI employees, membership changes

5a794ab5e0.en: Reading or exporting regulated / personal data

189f18d6e4.en: The two Floor classes, money and destructive, stay human-approved even when the dial is turned all the way up.

54928ac770.en: The gate finds you, even with the tab closed.

ea748b7248.en: An approval is only useful if it reaches you. When an AI employee raises a gated action, Nomik pushes it to your devices, no open tab required, and lets you resolve it on the spot.

488d8cff7d.en: Web push wakes a closed tab: the same notification that reaches your phone makes an open desktop instant.

d827971194.en: Email fallback for the urgent ones: if a high-priority interrupt reaches zero live devices, it falls back to email, so an approval is never silently lost.

5a09276bc2.en: One tap to resolve: tapping Approve opens Nomik and resolves the action on the spot, authorized by a single-use token that's spent on first click.

55bebefe6b.en: A record an auditor can actually read.

91bc5187da.en: Every gated decision becomes a durable row, not a log line that scrolls away. The trail renders in plain language, on behalf of Alice Martin · using Alice's Gmail, and survives reloads and restarts.

80f48bd87b.en: Full lifecycle: pending → approved or denied → executed or failed, with the approver and timestamp on every transition.

0062cec0a3.en: Approver ≠ requester: enforced in code, an AI employee cannot resolve a gate it raised, and no one can self-approve a hire.

8ada75fa7c.en: Cost is first-class: each turn carries its own dollar figure, rolled up per AI employee and per workspace.

0d8d993014.en: Tenants don't leak. Enforced below the app.

8620c59ca6.en: The strongest guarantees are the ones that don't depend on application code remembering to check. Ours live in the database, the cipher, and the message bus.

235fcec262.en: A tenant fence in the database

2fd2fcc0db.en: Every tenant table runs Postgres FORCE row-level security. The app connects as a demoted role that is not a superuser and cannot bypass RLS, the service refuses to boot otherwise, and a CI canary proves one workspace can't read another's rows.

dc2f7e8f0f.en: A vault, sealed to your workspace

ab07ea5f96.en: Connector credentials are encrypted with AES-256-GCM and cryptographically bound to your workspace ID. A credential moved to another tenant fails to decrypt, closed. Secrets never sit in plaintext and never leave the vault unapproved.

5aca04cf63.en: Each workspace is its own isolated account on the agent message bus. An AI employee's credentials can't even name another workspace's subjects, and the sandbox set is denied the control-plane subjects outright.

7ac43b2a7a.en: Each AI employee runs in its own Docker container with CPU, memory, and process limits, a no-new-privileges flag, and seccomp + AppArmor profiles. Compute is contained, not shared.

d1b4a8163c.en: Access tokens are RS256-signed and verified against a published JWKS. Refresh tokens rotate, hashed at rest, and a reused one kills the whole family. A Redis denylist enforces logout-everywhere across services, fail-closed.

c7ed17a986.en: Every request carries a principal that is explicitly human or agent. Human-only routes opt in by name, and every refusal returns a machine-readable code, so an AI employee sees a precise reason, not a generic 403.

4fb0ab394b.en: Run it where your data is allowed to live.

508f1145bc.en: A capable AI workforce that can run inside your own walls is what most AI platforms can't offer. We're honest about what's shipped today and what's on the way.

c9351569df.en: A turnkey private-cloud and air-gapped bundle, local model serving on your GPUs, for regulated, public-sector, and offline environments. In active design, not yet shipped.

fd78d8a4e8.en: Point the fleet at a model you control.

3220afa1d5.en: Local / open models: run your AI employees against your own GPUs over a standard endpoint (Ollama, vLLM, LM Studio, llama.cpp), at flat, bounded compute cost.

2dc8a6b5a6.en: Best-of-breed where you allow it: a frontier cloud model for the hard call, local models for high-volume work, your choice per role.

392ef01d90.en: Local knowledge by default: the workspace knowledge base embeds on a free, key-less local model, so your documents' vectors stay in by default, no key required.

cd112ef30f.en: Built for the regulated and the sovereign.

9ec6628d23.en: A privacy-and-residency posture designed in from the start. (We're candid about certifications, see what's real below.)

9d0f67a81b.en: Data residency: pin processing and storage to the EU, or to your own infrastructure with self-hosting.

5c3b40efe7.en: GDPR posture: a Data Processing Addendum, lawful basis, data-subject requests, and retention controls.

b90cc7f4da.en: Erase & export: account deletion and data export paths built around the data-subject's rights.

1463031efd.en: Isolation & vault: each AI employee isolated; secrets scoped to the workspace, granted by you, never held unapproved.

e2ed7dd462.en: What's real today, and what isn't yet.

137cf44c76.en: The same honesty we hold our AI employees to, we hold ourselves to. These are in build, not live, and we won't pretend otherwise.

0bd824d575.en: The open-core split is shipped and CI-gated. A turnkey on-prem / air-gapped bundle with local model serving is specced and in design, not yet a download.

23f586a6fd.en: Voice runs on cloud speech providers today and hasn't been exercised end to end. Keeping call audio fully inside your boundary is a goal, not a current claim.

248eecc25c.en: The app-layer controls above are real and enforced. We don't yet hold SOC 2 or ISO 27001, and we won't imply an audit we haven't passed.

880b4ac33b.en: The endgame: weights inside your walls.

8d03183bc8.en: Sovereignty isn't a deployment diagram, it's who owns the moving parts. We're making the two biggest ones open: the platform core and the model itself.

a1ea170f34.en: The platform core, workspaces, agents, connectors, the gate, the audit trail, is being packaged as a self-hostable open edition. The cloud edition adds billing, SSO, and seats on top. Same code, your boundary.

2296ad251f.en: We're post-training our own open-weight agent model so the fleet can ship as weights on one GPU or a Mac Studio: no API key leaves the building, and the safety gates ride inside the model. Apache-2.0 release target.

afa5e47dcd.en: Work once. The same work gets cheaper every time after.

c1a52d9318.en: Your AI workforce doesn't start from zero every morning. It records what worked, proves it, and promotes it, so the second time is always faster and cheaper than the first.

6654d00cfe.en: An AI employee does the work

a5ace3fbcd.en: It runs the task, makes the calls, and hits the rough edges that only show up in your real data and your real tools.

90f510d7b7.en: The steps that landed, and the gotcha that bit it, become a skill: a short, named procedure with a clear "use this when" line.

c9d82347f2.en: A skill is only trusted once it has actually worked. Until then it's a draft, used with care, not gospel.

03388b6e88.en: Proven skills get promoted to the shared canon, so every AI employee in the workspace starts the next job already knowing the trick, and bills you less to finish it.

4ef713b921.en: Plain text, not a black box.

e01c66b0b1.en: A skill is a short, readable file: a name, a one-line "use this when", the procedure, and the gotchas. You can read every one your AI workforce relies on, and so can the next AI employee.

7c46bc0de5.en: Named and scoped: a sharp description tells an AI employee exactly when to reach for it.

b9eeb478d5.en: Procedure, not prose: the steps to follow, in order, kept tight.

f8ed45808b.en: Gotchas: the failure that taught the lesson, dated, so it never repeats.

d507048717.en: Each AI employee keeps its own working memory. The skills that prove out get raised into a shared canon the whole workspace reads from, so a win on one desk lifts the whole workforce.

6bc2c205d7.en: Private memory: an AI employee's own notes and drafts, scoped to its work.

51858330dc.en: Shared canon: the verified skills and standards every AI employee inherits.

ef1a9aab0f.en: Always yours: skills live in your workspace, readable and auditable, not locked in a model.

0c68e2cfee.en: The AI workforce your business hires.

7375f5aa39.en: The pattern is the same in every business: you hire AI employees into each function, connect your stack, and supervise the work in the open, approving only the consequential calls. Here's a day in the life, by business type.

065f293429.en: Drowning in support tickets, ad busywork, and manual bookkeeping, no time to grow because they're running to stand still.

205d238feb.en: Overnight: a payment_failed → dunning trigger recovers carts; Support drafts every ticket, sends the routine ones, holds refunds for approval.

7ff5ef65de.en: A call comes in: an AI employee answers by voice, looks up the order, offers store credit, escalates the angry one with a transcript ready.

cdbb0a773a.en: "Plan a spring sale": Growth drafts the campaign and budget; the founder approves the spend and they launch.

bcd7c3f952.en: What changed: support runs around the clock; the founder spends the day on growth, not the inbox.

1e45f1c5e8.en: Small eng team, a backlog that never shrinks, support and sales falling on the founders.

8dcbec11b6.en: A goal in chat: the orchestrator triages, the bug routes to an engineer, the feature goes to a principal for a spec.

999b2d98fa.en: It ships: the engineer patches and tests green inline; QA verifies; the founder approves the deploy in one click.

d185572ffa.en: Signals flow in: triggers turn product feedback into tasks and enterprise leads into ready-to-send outreach.

e155bae778.en: What changed: the founders set direction and approved a handful of things. Their AI workforce did the rest.

d2ae162337.en: The bottleneck is coordination, every client wants updates, every project runs in parallel, and senior people drown in status admin.

d407dedfb9.en: Workforce: one workspace per client, an account lead (human) + Growth/Content/Design AI employees + a per-workspace Nomik

0a81d5ce68.en: Per client: each workspace's Nomik posts a status digest, and AI employees draft posts and creatives the lead approves in threads.

50565b37e5.en: A request lands: an inbound email → scope + task trigger turns "can we add a landing page?" into an estimate the lead sends.

5847d34a0b.en: Month-end: a trigger has timesheets and invoices ready; the owner reviews margins per client.

5226ed11ec.en: What changed: more clients, no more coordination overhead. Seniors do senior work; their AI employees do the glue.

f5096c3610.en: Compliance reviews the glass-box audit (#events + decisions ledger) to confirm exactly what every AI employee did.

12879bf803.en: What changed: a regulated business gets the full leverage of an AI workforce without a data-exit risk, the capability competitors can't offer.
